entries.source: "Compare law and psychology"
entries.value: "Déan comparáid idir an dlí agus an tsíceolaíocht"

entries.source: "I like biology and art"
entries.value: "Is maith liom bitheolaíocht agus ealaín"

entries.source: "What does a product manager do?"
entries.value: "Cad a dhéanann bainisteoir táirge?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Career Explorer on inspir for planning learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Treoir phraiticiúil ar Career Explorer a úsáid ar inspir le haghaidh foghlaim phleanála, le prasaí, lúba staidéir, agus nósanna IS níos sábháilte.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lúb staidéir níos láidre

entries.source: Adapt the session to your goal.
entries.value: Cuir an seisiún in oiriúint do do sprioc.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Teagascóir IS

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Iarr céad chéim bheag seachas freagra deiridh.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS do réasúnaíocht a sheiceáil, ní an toradh amháin.

entries.source: Career Explorer
entries.value: Taiscéalaí Gairme

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Mód Foghlama IS Career Explorer chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: fiosraigh gairmeacha trí shuimeanna, scileanna, samplaí de lá i saol an phoist, agus na chéad chéimeanna eile.

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Mód Foghlama IS Career Explorer: treoir phraiticiúil

entries.source: Discover paths that fit you.
entries.value: Faigh amach conairí a oireann duit.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Críochnaigh trí an smaoineamh a scríobh ar ais ó chuimhne.

entries.source: Learners exploring planning topics who want practical guidance instead of a generic answer box.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag fiosrú ábhair phleanála agus ar mian leo treoir phraiticiúil seachas bosca freagraí ginearálta.

entries.source: Planning
entries.value: Pleanáil

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prasaí le triail

entries.source: Start the live mode at Career Explorer. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Interview Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Tosaigh an mód beo ag Career Explorer. Más mian leat formáid foghlama chomharsanachta, bain triail as Interview Coach. Le haghaidh léargas níos leithne ar an ardán, léigh cad ba chóir do chompánach foghlama IS a dhéanamh do chách.

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Tosaigh le prasaí samplacha.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Inis don mhód cad atá tú ag iarraidh a fhoghlaim nó a tháirgeadh.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Taispeánann an difríocht sin í féin sa sreabhadh. In ionad freagra ollmhór amháin, bogann na seisiúin is fearr trí lúb: socraigh sprioc, bain triail as rud éigin, faigh aiseolas, deisigh an pointe lag, agus roghnaigh an chéad ghníomh eile.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Tá an fócas sin tábhachtach. Is féidir le chatbot ginearálta beagnach aon rud a fhreagairt, ach tugann mód foghlama cruth don chomhrá. Spreagann sé thú i dtreo an chineáil smaointeoireachta, cleachtaidh, aiseolais, nó fiosraithe a chabhraíonn leis an smaoineamh fanacht.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Is é seo an nós céanna taobh thiar de staidéar le IS gan caimiléireacht a dhéanamh ort féin: coinnigh an foghlaimeoir gníomhach. Is úsáidí IS nuair a thugann sí aiseolas ar do smaointeoireacht.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Tá an mód seo thar a bheith úsáideach d’fhoghlaimeoirí ar mian leo:

entries.source: This mode is tuned for career explorer with its own prompts, examples, and learning flow.
entries.value: Tá an modh seo curtha in oiriúint don taiscéalaí gairme, lena leideanna, samplaí agus sreabhadh foghlama féin.

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Bain triail as an gcéim i d’fhocail féin.

entries.source: Use Career Explorer when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Career Explorer nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Cad leis a gcabhraíonn an mód seo

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Cá háit le dul ina dhiaidh sin

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Is féidir leat tosú freisin le leagan garbh de d’fhadhb fhíor. Tá céad phras míshlachtmhar ceart go leor. Is féidir leis an seisiún an leibhéal, an lucht féachana, an spriocdháta, agus an stíl a shoiléiriú nuair a thosaíonn tú.
